case_title: F. MARK YAZDANI VS. PETER CASTRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY YAZDANI, F. MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YAZDANI, F. MARK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAZDANI, F. MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, PETER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-29-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, PETER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAZDANI, F. MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CASTRO, PETER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
